results.title: NeighborWorks Pocatello awarded USDA Technical Assistance Grant, seeks families for Mutual Self-Help Housing Program
results.description: POCATELLO — NeighborWorks Pocatello has officially been awarded a USDA Section 523 Mutual Self-Help Housing Technical Assistance Grant, allowing the organization to launch its first round of Mutual Self-Help Housing in American Falls.

results.description: North Carolina property taxes are in the news this spring. Republican state lawmakers are advancing a proposed constitutional amendment that would direct the legislature to limit local property tax increases. [...]
